privileged_info_summary: The task uses real NHANES survey data loaded into LibreHealth EHR for educational purposes. Patient Allan Thomas (pid=782, male, DOB 1984-07-15, married status) is a genuine NHANES participant in the dataset. The medical problem to be added is Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus with ICD-10 code E11, which is the correct parent code for Type 2 diabetes (E11.9 'without complications' is the more specific variant used in the NHANES database). All patient identifiers and medical coding have been verified against the official NHANES SQL dump from the LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr repository.
